summary: **Status:** decided for programme-side minting; **held open for PSS input** on the estate-interop question before any cross-estate identity claims. Implements design-review change 2 (`notes/panel-kernel-design-review.md`), which blocks bulk minting (bead arq) until this exists.
title: Canonical hash-input form for kernel minting (coordinator decision, 2026-07-07)
